article_meta.title: Police turned him over to ICE

reasoning: Largely neutral paraphrase that avoids the article’s loaded rhetoric. Minor lapses include calling 287(g) “controversial” and “expanded dramatically” without attribution, but most evaluative claims are properly attributed to critics, and emotive phrases from the article are not adopted.

custom_reasoning.spin: Mostly neutral verbs; slight spin with “controversial” and “expanded dramatically.”
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Facts either drawn from article or attributed; no unsupported assertions.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Uses “controversial” in own voice once; otherwise attributes opinions to critics.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No alarming or emotional amplification beyond facts.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about unobservable intentions or thoughts.
custom_reasoning.slant: Emphasizes critics and questions about 287(g); supportive perspective is not equally presented.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Omits mention that some law enforcement praise 287(g) as improving safety, which appears in the article.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Terminology is generally neutral; avoids ideologically loaded labels.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Tragic event is central but tone remains factual and proportional to source.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No systematic deference to elite or grassroots over the other.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Avoids the source’s charged metaphors and rhetoric; minor residual loaded terms.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Captures critics and family perspectives well; pro-287(g) viewpoint underrepresented.
